html:
Exclusive to:

GenericStumpSaplingSapling (Item)

Sproutrocks are one of two ancient trees that can grow from a Surprising Seed. There are two requirements for it to grow: in Summer or is planted on its preferred turf: Rocky Turf, Cave Rock Turf or Cave Fumarole Turf.

To grow a Sproutrock seed into a sapling, the seed must meet one of the requirements. If both of these conditions are met but the character says that the seed can not grow when examined, it means that it is the seed for a Gloomthorn. Otherwise, the seed will grow into a Sproutrock Sapling after 3–7 days.

Once the seed has sprouted into a Sproutrock Sapling, it will only continue to grow if both of its conditions are met. If they are, it will turn into a Sproutrock after 8–12 days.

Sproutrocks will grow 3 Geode Fruits every 12 to 25 days, provided it is still on its preferred turf.

The timer for Geode Fruit regrowth is set upon creation of the seed and will stay the same throughout its lifetime and every harvest. Mining the tree and replanting the seed will not change this regrowth timer, although it will be reduced by 25% in Spring.

Tips

  • Maxwell's Shadow Servants will not chop or harvest the Sproutrocks.

Gallery

  • Sproutrock concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Sproutrock concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

GenericStumpSaplingSapling (Item)
“It's vegetable AND mineral. Fascinating.”
–Wilson, Generic
“It's... it's so beautiful...”
–Willow, Generic
“Rocky tree have big strong trunk like Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, Generic
“Burning from the inside... it must be agony.”
–Wendy, Generic
“HATE LEVEL: UNDETERMINED”
–WX-78, Generic
“How interesting, it seems to produce its own heat from within.”
–Wickerbottom, Generic
“Whoa, Lucy. This is not your kind of tree.”
–Woodie, Generic
“I'm sure it will burn out eventually.”
–Maxwell, Generic
“A fire burns within, yet the tree lives?”
–Wigfrid, Generic
“Aww, it's too hot to climb.”
–Webber, Generic
“Is there something cooking inside?”
–Warly, Generic
“Firerock Friend!”
–Wormwood, Generic
“That tree has got fire in its belly.”
–Winona, Generic
“The tree furnace burns in earnest.”
–Wortox, Generic
“Even Wicker-lady don't know if rock or tree.”
–Wurt, Generic
“Neat! I wonder how the tree keeps from catching fire?”
–Walter, Generic
“It burns with an everlasting fire... how inspiring.”
–Wanda, Generic
“This tree has been mined.”
–Wilson, Stump
“Nooooooooo!!”
–Willow, Stump
“You give to us everything.”
–Wolfgang, Stump
“It's been put out of its misery.”
–Wendy, Stump
“THE INORGANIC PARTS WILL NEVER DIE”
–WX-78, Stump
“A shame, really.”
–Wickerbottom, Stump
“This is not the work of an axe.”
–Woodie, Stump
“Close enough.”
–Maxwell, Stump
“It hath been felled.”
–Wigfrid, Stump
“Poor Mr. Tree.”
–Webber, Stump
“Nothing but a stump left.”
–Warly, Stump
“Will miss friend”
–Wormwood, Stump
“Just a pile of rubble now.”
–Winona, Stump
“Once a tree, now debris.”
–Wortox, Stump
“Just rocks now.”
–Wurt, Stump
“Is that a rock? No wait, it's a stump!”
–Walter, Stump
“Ah. I suppose that fire wasn't so everlasting after all.”
–Wanda, Stump
“It's growing! I think?”
–Wilson, Sapling
“It's almost a tree.”
–Willow, Sapling
“Little tree, grow mighty like Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang, Sapling
“Maybe if you're lucky, you'll get the chance to grow up.”
–Wendy, Sapling
“CONDITIONS: OPTIMAL. WHO DID THIS?”
–WX-78, Sapling
“It appears to be growing nicely.”
–Wickerbottom, Sapling
“Soon, Lucy. Soon.”
–Woodie, Sapling
“It's coming along nicely.”
–Maxwell, Sapling
“These lands seem tö suit it well.”
–Wigfrid, Sapling
“We think it likes its new home.”
–Webber, Sapling
“Just a petite bébé.”
–Warly, Sapling
“Happy young friend!”
–Wormwood, Sapling
“Looks like it's on its way.”
–Winona, Sapling
“Not to get sappy, I'm glad it's happy.”
–Wortox, Sapling
“Plant's friend growing!”
–Wurt, Sapling
“I can't wait to see what kind of tree it grows into!”
–Walter, Sapling
“Only marginally more exciting than watching grass grow.”
–Wanda, Sapling
“I need to plant this in the right place.”
–Wilson, Sapling (Item)
“I bet you want some dirt, don't ya?”
–Willow, Sapling (Item)
“Don't worry, little tree. Wolfgang find good home for you.”
–Wolfgang, Sapling (Item)
“Don't worry. I'll bury you.”
–Wendy, Sapling (Item)
“WHERE SHOULD I PLANT FILTY ORGANIC TO EVENTUALLY DIE?”
–WX-78, Sapling (Item)
“I will endeavor to find a suitable environment for it.”
–Wickerbottom, Sapling (Item)
“Where would you like to be chopped down eventually?”
–Woodie, Sapling (Item)
“I suppose I have no choice but to get my hands dirty.”
–Maxwell, Sapling (Item)
“Fear nöt, I shall find yöu a place tö lay döwn yöur röots.”
–Wigfrid, Sapling (Item)
“We're going to find a good home for you!”
–Webber, Sapling (Item)
“Allons-y! I can't just leave this little tree uprooted!”
–Warly, Sapling (Item)
“Where young friend want to live?”
–Wormwood, Sapling (Item)
“This might be one of them finicky trees.”
–Winona, Sapling (Item)
“It's tricky with a tree so picky.”
–Wortox, Sapling (Item)
“Where put Plant's friend?”
–Wurt, Sapling (Item)
“Sniff out a good spot for us to plant the tree, Woby!”
–Walter, Sapling (Item)
“Now, if I could only remember what type of soil it likes...”
–Wanda, Sapling (Item)

Tips[edit | edit source]
Maxwell's Shadow Servants will not chop or harvest the Sproutrocks.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Sproutrock concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.
Sproutrock concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mầm là một trong hai cây cổ thụ có thể mọc lên từ Hạt giống Bất ngờ. Có hai yêu cầu để nó phát triển: vào Mùa hè hoặc được trồng trên loại cỏ ưa thích của nó: Đất Đá, Đất Đá Hang hoặc Đất Hang Fumarole.
